The '''''Adventure''''' was a [[DP20 gunship/Legends|DP20 gunship]] in the service of the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Fleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''

[[Category:Starships of the Alliance to Restore the Republic]]
